info.name: CRM API
info.description:
Postman collection for the CRM API (Laravel + JWT auth).

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer JWT in the `Authorization` header. Run **Authentication > Login** (or **Register**) first — its request includes a small script that automatically saves the returned `access_token` into the `{{access_token}}` collection/environment variable, which every other request reuses via the collection-level Bearer auth.

## Roles
- `admin`
- `sales-manager`
- `sales-executive`

Some endpoints are restricted by role (see each request's description). Sales executives are additionally scoped to only their own tasks.

## Variables
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `base_url` | API base URL, e.g. `http://localhost:8000/api` |
| `access_token` | JWT bearer token, auto-populated by Login/Register/Refresh |
| `lead_id` | A lead ID used by Show/Update/Delete/Assign/Status/Convert requests |
| `customer_id` | A customer ID used by Customers/Notes requests |
| `task_id` | A task ID used by Tasks Show/Update/Delete requests |

request.description:
Register a new user.

**Rate limited:** 5 requests/minute.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| name | string | yes | max:255 |
| email | string | yes | email, unique |
| password | string | yes | min:8, must be confirmed |
| password_confirmation | string | yes | must match `password` |
| role | string | no | `sales-manager` or `sales-executive`; defaults to `sales-executive` |

Authenticate a user and receive a JWT access token.

**Rate limited:** 5 requests/minute.

| Field | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | yes |
| password | string | yes |

On success, the `access_token` is automatically saved to the `access_token` variable for use by all other requests.
Issue a new JWT using the current (possibly soon-to-expire) token. Send the current `access_token` as the Bearer token; no request body.
Invalidate the current JWT. Requires Bearer token. No request body.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile. Requires Bearer token.

query.description: Matches first_name, last_name, email, or company
One of: new, contacted, qualified, proposal_sent, won, lost

request.description:
List leads (paginated). Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

**Query params**
| Param | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| search | string | matches first_name, last_name, email, company |
| status | string | new, contacted, qualified, proposal_sent, won, lost |
| per_page | integer | default 15 |

Create a new lead. Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| first_name | string | yes | max:255 |
| last_name | string | yes | max:255 |
| email | string | yes | email, max:255 |
| phone | string | no | max:50 |
| company | string | no | max:255 |
| status | string | no | enum, defaults to `new` |
| source | string | no | max:255 |
| assigned_to | integer | no | must exist in users |
Get a single lead by ID. Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

Partially update a lead. Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

All fields are optional (`sometimes`) and accept the same constraints as Create: `first_name`, `last_name`, `email`, `phone`, `company`, `status`, `source`, `assigned_to`.
Delete a lead. Roles: admin, sales-manager only. Returns 204 No Content.

Assign (or unassign) a lead to a user. Roles: admin, sales-manager only.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| assigned_to | integer\|null | yes | must exist in users; `null` unassigns |

Update a lead's status. Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| status | string | yes | one of: new, contacted, qualified, proposal_sent, won, lost |

Convert a lead into a customer. Roles: admin, sales-manager only. No request body — copies company/contact/email/phone from the lead, sets the lead's status to `won`, and creates a customer record. Returns 422 if the lead was already converted.
List customers (paginated). Roles: admin, sales-manager only.
Get a single customer by ID, including its source lead and notes. Roles: admin, sales-manager only.
List all notes for a customer (latest first, not paginated). Roles: admin, sales-manager only.

Add a note to a customer. Roles: admin, sales-manager only. The author (`user_id`) is set automatically from the authenticated user.

| Field | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| note | string | yes |

query.description: true to filter tasks past due_date and not completed

request.description:
List tasks (paginated). Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive (sales-executives only see their own tasks).

**Query params**
| Param | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| user_id | integer | filter by assignee |
| status | string | pending, in_progress, completed |
| priority | string | low, medium, high |
| overdue | boolean | due_date in the past and not completed |
| per_page | integer | default 15 |

body.raw:
{
    "user_id": 2,
    "lead_id": "{{lead_id}}",
    "customer_id": null,
    "title": "Follow up call",
    "description": "Discuss proposal details and next steps.",
    "priority": "high",
    "status": "pending",
    "due_date": "2026-07-05",
    "reminder_at": "2026-07-04 09:00:00"
}

request.description:
Create a new task. Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| user_id | integer | yes | must exist in users |
| customer_id | integer | no* | must exist in customers |
| lead_id | integer | no* | must exist in leads |
| title | string | yes | max:255 |
| description | string | no | |
| priority | string | no | low, medium, high (default medium) |
| status | string | no | pending, in_progress, completed (default pending) |
| due_date | date | yes | |
| reminder_at | datetime | no | |

\* At least one of `lead_id` or `customer_id` is required.
Get a single task by ID. Sales-executives can only view their own tasks (403 otherwise).

Partially update a task. Sales-executives can only update their own tasks (403 otherwise).

All fields are optional (`sometimes`), same constraints as Create: `user_id`, `customer_id`, `lead_id`, `title`, `description`, `priority`, `status`, `due_date`, `reminder_at`. At least one of `lead_id`/`customer_id` must remain set.
Delete a task. Sales-executives can only delete their own tasks (403 otherwise). Returns 204 No Content.

List the audit/activity log (paginated, latest first). Roles: admin, sales-manager only.

Known `action` values: `lead.created`, `lead.assigned`, `lead.status_updated`, `lead.converted`, `task.created`, `task.updated`, `task.deleted`, `customer.note_added`.

Get aggregate dashboard statistics. Roles: admin, sales-manager, sales-executive.

Response shape:
```json
{
  "total_leads": 0,
  "total_customers": 0,
  "todays_follow_ups": 0,
  "overdue_tasks": 0,
  "leads_by_status": { "new": 0, "contacted": 0, "qualified": 0, "proposal_sent": 0, "won": 0, "lost": 0 },
  "conversion_rate": 0.0
}
```
